title: cephalocroton orientalis
intro: Cephalocroton orientalis, also known as the 'golden rain tree', is a plant species in the family Euphorbiaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. It has been claimed to have health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating various skin conditions. Cephalocroton orientalis can be prepared as an herbal remedy in various forms, including teas, infusions, and extracts, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
